---

## 🏢 About SystemDo

**SystemDo** is a professional enterprise software development company based in Dongguan, China, serving global businesses for over **10 years**. We specialize in full-cycle custom software development — from requirements analysis and UI/UX design through development, deployment, and long-term maintenance.

We bridge the gap between **business needs and technical execution**. Our team understands your industry, speaks your language, and delivers software that works.

> **"懂业务，也懂技术 — We understand your business, and we master the technology."**

---

## 🛠️ Core Services

| # | Service | Keywords |
|---|---------|----------|
| ① | **Enterprise Management Systems** | CRM · ERP · OA · MES · WMS · OMS · PIM · HRM · QMS · Inventory · Supply Chain |
| ② | **Global E-Commerce Websites** | Shopify · WordPress · WooCommerce · Nuxt 3 · Next.js · SEO · GEO · Google Ads · GA4 · Meta Pixel · Cloudflare |
| ③ | **WeChat Mini Programs** | E-Commerce · Booking · Registration · Membership · Marketing · WeCom · Official Accounts · WeChat Pay |
| ④ | **Mobile App & H5 Development** | Flutter · uni-app · Vue · Android · iOS · React Native · IoT · Bluetooth · QR Scan · Maps · Payments · Push |
| ⑤ | **AI Automation** | ChatGPT · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI API · RAG · AI Agents · AI Customer Service · AI Knowledge Base · MCP · Codex · Cursor |
| ⑥ | **System Deployment & DevOps** | Linux · Docker · Redis · MySQL · Nginx · PM2 · Node.js · PHP · Laravel · CI/CD · SSL · Vercel · Monitoring · Backup |

---

## 🗺️ Roadmap & Future Plans

- [ ] Open-source reusable enterprise application templates
- [ ] Publish technical blog posts and case studies

- [ ] Build an AI-powered enterprise knowledge base framework
- [ ] Release deployment automation scripts and Docker compose templates
- [ ] Expand community contributions and documentation
